query: SELECT title, event_date, category, summary, issue_tags FROM timeline_events WHERE public_status = 1 AND (issue_tags LIKE '%faretta%' OR issue_tags LIKE '%competency%' OR category = 'warrant' OR category = 'competency' OR title LIKE '%Faretta%' OR title LIKE '%self-rep%' OR title LIKE '%federal%' OR title LIKE '%civil%') ORDER BY event_date ASC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2N1WTErRdSjheBh.e46440e12186 --database 3yhU3DrKzf8Z5BNtvxatFF --execute SELECT title, event_date, category, summary, issue_tags FROM timeline_events WHERE public_status = 1 AND (issue_tags LIKE '%faretta%' OR issue_tags LIKE '%competency%' OR category = 'warrant' OR category = 'competency' OR title LIKE '%Faretta%' OR title LIKE '%self-rep%' OR title LIKE '%federal%' OR title LIKE '%civil%') ORDER BY event_date ASC LIMIT 20;

rows.title: Pro se motion to dismiss and request for new counsel filed
rows.summary: Cameron Church filed pro se motion alleging ineffective assistance, lack of victim, and issues with a Young hearing request.

rows.title: Order striking defendant's pro se motion to dismiss
rows.summary: Judge Barry L. Breslow struck defendant's pro se motion because Church was represented by counsel. Issue: hybrid representation / Faretta / access to courts.

rows.title: Order granting motion to strike pro se sanctions filing
rows.summary: Court struck the sanctions motion and response under hybrid-representation rules.

rows.title: Pro se motion for leave to file pro se motions
rows.summary: Church filed pro se motion seeking leave to file pro se motions because of alleged counsel ineffectiveness and obstruction.

rows.title: Order striking defendant's late-November pro se filings
rows.summary: Judge Breslow struck late-November pro se filings because defendant was represented by counsel.

rows.title: Young hearing — competency evaluation ordered; proceedings stayed
rows.summary: Transcript/minutes identify Judge Breslow, DDA Aziz Merchant, Galen Carrico, and Cameron Church. Court ordered competency evaluation, stayed proceedings, and restricted pro se filings.

rows.title: Competency order entered nunc pro tunc to December 5
rows.summary: Competency order entered nunc pro tunc to December 5. Church filed pro se mandamus petition challenging Judge Breslow and DA's office.

rows.title: OSC hearing — pretrial release revoked; no-bail bench warrant issued
rows.summary: Minutes state pretrial release was revoked and no-bail bench warrant issued for failure to appear.

rows.title: Bench warrant and extradition order materials
rows.summary: Record set includes bench warrant/no-bail hold and extradition order materials dated December 19, 2024.

rows.title: Federal Civil Rights Complaint Filed (ECF 5)
rows.summary: Plaintiff Cameron Church files original civil rights complaint in U.S. District Court, D. Nev., Case No. 3:24-cv-00579-ART-CSD, alleging constitutional violations by Washoe County defendants arising from the state criminal case CR23-0657.

rows.title: State files motion for contempt over pro se filings
rows.summary: State filed motion for contempt seeking jail time for pro se filings. Exhibit spreadsheet also links this date to initiation of 42 U.S.C. Section 1983 federal action.

rows.title: Trial and pretrial motions hearing vacated pending competency
rows.summary: Order vacated March 2025 trial and pretrial motions hearing pending competency proceedings.

rows.title: Federal Court Issues Order After State Court Arrest (ECF 13)
rows.summary: Federal district court issues order following plaintiff arrest in the state case, acknowledging the intersection of the federal civil rights case and the ongoing state criminal proceedings.

rows.title: Warrant service
rows.summary: Warrant-service document dated April 23, 2025 in record set.

rows.title: Competency court order — transfer to Department 7
rows.summary: Nunc pro tunc/order-for-competency record transferred case to Department 7 / competency court.

rows.title: First competency report — Lindsay Coyle
rows.summary: Forensic competency report by Lindsay Coyle filed in CR23-0657. Contains medical/mental-health information; redaction required before public posting.

rows.title: Civil Standing Order Issued (ECF 16)
rows.summary: Court issues civil standing order governing procedures for the case.

rows.title: Second competency report — Dr. Rachael Pinkerman
rows.summary: Confidential competency evaluation by Dr. Rachael Pinkerman. Exhibit index states evaluator found competency under Dusky standard and noted refusal to participate due to retaliation. Redaction required.

rows.title: Parties stipulate to third competency evaluation
rows.summary: Parties stipulated to third competency evaluation due to conflicting opinions from first two evaluators.

rows.title: Defense counsel Samuel Figueroa moves to withdraw
rows.summary: Samuel Figueroa moved to withdraw citing relationship breakdown and defendant's desire for self-representation or motions counsel considered repugnant.
